title: Lead Graphic Designer
description:
We are looking for a Lead Graphic Designer to own and elevate the visual identity, creative quality, and design systems of our brand. This is a senior-level individual contributor role with strong creative leadership influence. You will serve as the guardian of visual standards, the final approver for major design outputs, and the driver of design system evolution across all touchpoints including campaigns, web, social, product storytelling, and marketing.

This role blends hands-on craft with high-level creative direction. You will set the design bar, guide designers in best practices, and ensure all creative work is cohesive, on-brand, and strategically aligned with business goals.

What You'll Do

  • Act as the final approver for major design outputs, ensuring high craft, strong brand alignment, and visual cohesion across all assets.

  • Own and evolve the brand’s design system, including typography, color, components, and overall visual direction.

  • Create and maintain clear style guides and templates used across the organization.

  • Lead and execute high-impact design projects such as campaigns, product launches, brand updates, and major visual initiatives.

  • Collaborate with senior creative leadership to ensure design supports long-term brand vision and campaign goals.

  • Provide direction and feedback to designers to maintain quality, consistency, and best practices across all work.

  • Support junior and mid-level designers through guidance, templates, and mentorship.

Who You Are

  • With minimum 5 years of proven experience as a senior-level designer or similar role, with a deep understanding of design principles and brand systems, experience in fashion, beauty, or retail / e-commerce is preferred, but not required.
  • An exceptional portfolio showcasing a strong eye for detail, visual quality, and brand-consistent work.
  • Expertise in owning and evolving a brand's visual identity across multiple touchpoints.
  • Strong mentorship skills and the ability to set creative standards for a team.
  • A collaborative spirit and experience working with a multidisciplinary creative team.

About Ask & Embla & Ambi

Who We Are:

Ask & Embla

is a rapidly growing jewelry brand born from alternative subcultures shaped by punk, goth, and music movements. We're based in Singapore, with a collective following of more than 850,000 across our social media channels. Our growth continues with the launch of Ambi, our piercing-focused jewelry brand, which carries the same spirit of self-expression as Ask & Embla.

As e-commerce brands, we ship internationally to a diverse customer base, and we are proud to be one of the leading brands worldwide in the alternative jewelry space. We’re passionate about creating a company that brings out the best in everyone, where individuals love to work and grow as a team. That means constantly learning, building new things, staying flexible about how and where we work, and empowering each other to do the proudest work of our lives.

Ask & Embla and Ambi are led by an ex-Googler and ex-Amazonian, supported by dozens of team members across multiple countries. We’re building the foundation to expand into several business verticals beyond e-commerce, while continuing our operations to fulfil thousands of orders each month.

Ready to Join Us?

If you're a results-oriented professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment, we encourage you to apply!

Learn More about Ask & Embla and Ambi:

Website - https://askandembla.net/

https://ambi.ooo/

Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/askemblastore/

https://www.instagram.com/ambi.ooo/

Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/AskEmblastore/

https://www.facebook.com/ooo.ambi/

Pinterest - https://www.pinterest.com/askemblastore/

https://www.pinterest.com/ambijewelry/

TikTok - https://www.tiktok.com/@askandembla_official

https://www.tiktok.com/@ambi.ooo

Why Work With Us?

We learn and build fast together, united not only by the purpose and passion of creating beautiful, expressive, and sustainably made jewelry, but also by a community that celebrates freedom in self-expression. Everyone deserves to be fully themselves, and our jewelry designs are contemporary emblems that let them do so with pride.

Job Details

Job Types:

Full-time

Expected hours: 40 per week

Pay:

Varies per location

Benefits:

  • Work from home [Remote]
  • Hybrid setup [SG-based]
  • Health insurance
  • Paid time-off
  • Employee discounts
  • Professional development opportunities

Schedule:

  • Day shift

Location:

  • Singapore - 115 KING GEORGE'S AVENUE, Singapore 208561
